    Class BufferView

    A view into a buffer generally representing a subset of the buffer.

    Inheritance

    JsonSerializable

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public sealed class BufferView : LogicalChildOfRoot, IExtraProperties, IChildOf<GlbData>

    Properties

    Name Description
    ByteStride

    Gets the number of bytes between the beginnings of successive elements, or Zero.
    Content

    Gets the actual bytes defined by this BufferView
    IsDataBuffer

    Gets a value indicating whether this BufferView defines a general purpose data buffer.
    IsIndexBuffer

    Gets a value indicating whether this BufferView defines a GPU Ready Index Buffer.
    IsVertexBuffer

    Gets a value indicating whether this BufferView defines a GPU Ready Vertex Buffer.

    Methods

    Name Description
    DeserializeProperty(string, ref Utf8JsonReader)

    Reads the properties of the current instance from a System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonReader.
    FindAccessors()

    Finds all the accessors using this BufferView
    FindImages()
    IsInterleaved(IEnumerable<Accessor>)

    Checks if accessors use this buffer in interleaved arrangement
    OnValidateContent(ValidationContext)
    OnValidateReferences(ValidationContext)
    SerializeProperties(Utf8JsonWriter)

    Writes the properties of the current instance to a System.Text.Json.Utf8JsonWriter.
